steps.title: Map the passage progression
steps.content: The text begins with a broad scientific interest in shipwrecks' ecological effects. It then narrows to Chen and colleagues' study of microbial communities near wooden shipwrecks and ends with one finding about peak diversity.

steps.title: Reject distorted structures
steps.content: Choice A adds historical significance not discussed. Choice B misstates the study as having received major scholarly attention and includes a reaction. Choice C focuses on wood type as the main point. The broad-interest, specific-study, finding sequence matches. The answer is D.
